pm_kisan.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
pm_kisan.benefit: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000. Direct bank transfer.
pm_kisan.eligibility: All farmer families with cultivable land. Up to 2 hectares in most states.
pm_kisan.exclusions: Institutional land holders. Professionals (doctors, engineers, CAs, lawyers). Pensioners above ₹10,000/month. Income tax payers.
pm_kisan.how_to_apply: pmkisan.gov.in → New Farmer Registration. Or visit CSC centre. Or contact local Patwari/Lekhpal.
pm_kisan.documents: Aadhaar, bank account linked to Aadhaar, land ownership documents (Khata/Khatauni).

pmfby.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
pmfby.benefit: Crop insurance. Farmer pays only 1.5-5% of sum insured. Rest shared by Centre and State.
pmfby.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Both loanee and non-loanee.
pmfby.how_to_apply: Loanee farmers: automatic through bank during loan. Non-loanee: CSC or insurance company portal or pmfby.gov.in.
pmfby.documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, sowing certificate (non-loanee).
pmfby.coverage: Yield loss due to natural calamities, pests, diseases. Also covers prevented sowing and post-harvest losses.

kcc.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
kcc.benefit: Low-interest credit for farming. Interest subvention 2%. Effective rate 4% per annum for timely repayment.
kcc.eligibility: All farmers — individual, joint, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees, SHGs.
kcc.how_to_apply: Any nationalized bank, cooperative bank, or RRB. Need land records, Aadhaar, passport photo.
kcc.credit_limit: Based on land holding. Typically ₹50,000 to ₹3 lakh+.
kcc.also_for: KCC also available for fishermen and animal husbandry at 4% interest.

ayushman.name: Ayushman Bharat — PM-JAY
ayushman.benefit: Free hospital treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family per year. Covers 1,900+ procedures.
ayushman.eligibility: Families identified from SECC 2011 data. Check at mera.pmjay.gov.in or call 14555.
ayushman.how_to_apply: No enrollment needed if eligible. Get Ayushman Card at CSC or empanelled hospital. Show card + Aadhaar.
ayushman.covers: Secondary and tertiary hospitalization — surgery, cancer treatment, heart procedures, etc.
ayushman.no_cap: No cap on family size, age, or pre-existing conditions.

mgnrega.name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
mgnrega.benefit: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per year. Minimum wage as per state rate (₹250-350/day).
mgnrega.eligibility: Any adult member of rural household willing to do unskilled manual work.
mgnrega.how_to_apply: Visit Gram Panchayat → apply for job card → demand work → must be provided within 15 days or get unemployment allowance.
mgnrega.documents: Aadhaar, job card (issued by Gram Panchayat), bank or post office account.
mgnrega.key_rights: Work must start within 15 days of demand. If not, unemployment allowance = 1/4 of wage for first 30 days, 1/2 thereafter. Work site must be within 5 km of village.

mudra.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
mudra.benefit: Collateral-free loans for micro/small enterprises. Shishu: up to ₹50,000. Kishore: up to ₹5 lakh. Tarun: up to ₹10 lakh.
mudra.eligibility: Any Indian citizen with business plan for non-farm income-generating activity.
mudra.how_to_apply: Any bank, NBFC, or MFI. Also mudra.org.in.
mudra.documents: Aadhaar, PAN, business plan, address proof, passport photo.
